testcase.name: testSuccessfulRegistration

failure.message: Expected the welcome/success page to be displayed after registration. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.name: testRegistrationWithDuplicateUsername

failure.message: Pre-condition failed: first registration with this username did not succeed. expected [true] but found [false]
